card_name_verified: Capital One Venture Rewards Credit Card

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Application Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($85) application fee. Renews every 4 years.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Up to a $120 statement credit when you use your Venture card to apply for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck

recurring_credits.name: Capital One Travel Hotel Experience Credit
recurring_credits.description: $50 experience credit at hotels booked through Capital One Travel — usable on rooftop drinks, restaurants, room service and other on-property amenities. Per qualifying stay.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $50 experience credit at hotels booked through Capital One Travel to use on experiences and amenities

_review_reason: $50 hotel experience credit is per_stay (not annual cap). OpenCard schema 'frequency' enum includes 'per_stay' — confirm the existing 69 cards use this consistently. The $50 isn't really 'recurring' in same sense as Uber Cash; it's a benefit available on every qualifying booking. May need clarification.
